rule-publication-requires-approval.description: Documents in categories with RequiresApproval cannot be published without approval

rule-expiry-alert.description: Alert document owner N days before expiry

rule-new-version-supersedes-current.description: Publishing a new version automatically sets previous version to Superseded
rule-new-version-supersedes-current.condition: on publish → previous published version Status = 'superseded'

rule-expired-document-read-only.description: Expired documents can be read but not used operationally
